channel.title: Spacex on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Spacex on jamesm.blog

item.title: SpaceX Buys the Right to Buy Cursor for $60 Billion
item.description: SpaceX has taken an option to acquire Cursor for $60 billion later this year, or pay $10 billion for a joint build. A look at the deal structure, what it tells us about xAI's coding ambitions, and why Anysphere is suddenly the most sought-after company in developer tools.

item.title: SpaceX Starship vs NASA SLS: Two Visions for Deep Space
item.description: A detailed comparison of SpaceX's Starship and NASA's Space Launch System - two fundamentally different approaches to returning humans to the Moon and beyond.

item.title: SpaceX Starfactory
item.description: Information about SpaceX's Starfactory production facility for Starship rocket manufacturing and assembly.
